meta.title: Constraint Engineering Manifesto
meta.description: The spine of Leviathan: constraints as product, eval harnesses as development loops, and DNA contracts that ground autonomous agent behavior.

props.title: Constraint Engineering Manifesto
props.subtitle: Constraints are the product. Specs explain them. Code implements them. Gates enforce them.

props.content: The harness IS the development loop, not a bolt-on testing tool. This document unifies the constraint engineering philosophy with a live DNA contract — the ATC Template Grounding Loop — showing how autonomous agents operate under constraint regimes that grow stronger with every tick.

props.label: GENESIS PATTERN
props.title: The 4-Step Core
props.subtitle: Every Leviathan project follows this spine — no exceptions

props.title: 📐 Define Constraints
props.content: Write `dna/*.yaml` contracts and validation gates **before** implementation. The constraints declare what 'correct' means.

props.title: 🔧 Build the Harness
props.content: The eval harness is itself constrained by its own DNA — self-referential grounding. The system verifies itself.

props.title: 🔁 Harness = FlowMind
props.content: The harness IS the development loop. Not a test suite you run after — the thing you develop *inside*.

props.title: 🏗️ Build Under Regime
props.content: Every tick produces an artifact. Every artifact passes gates. The constraint surface grows with every exploit discovered.

props.label: ARCHITECTURE
props.title: The Spine Pattern
props.subtitle: SDK-first 3-layer architecture extracted from AppTestr — 66 RPC methods across 10 domains

props.title: 🧱 SDK-First Layers
props.content:
**sdk/** — business logic (composable method routers)
**wrappers/** — adapters (CLI, MCP, HTTP, TypeScript SDK)
**driver/** — platform native code (Swift AX, browser, storage)

Wrappers MUST NOT own business logic. Enforced by lint gates.

props.title: 🔀 Composable Routers
props.content: Domain-specific routers implement `canHandle(method)` + `handle(method, params)`. Central `createMethodRouter()` chains them. Adding new domains doesn't touch dispatch.

props.title: ⚙️ Daemon Lifecycle
props.content: Unix socket, JSON-RPC, socket-locked singleton. CLI never runs business logic directly. The daemon owns all runtime state: sessions, recordings, dev lifecycle.

props.title: 👁️ Observe-Act-Verify
props.content: Single-step discipline. Multi-action plans without verification are **forbidden**. Maps directly to the eval flow: `produce → judge → compare → keep_or_discard`.

props.title: 🚧 Layer Enforcement
props.content: 500/700 LOC gates, layer import gates, and `tsc --noEmit` are hard CI gates. Not suggestions — **enforcement**.

props.title: 🗂️ 7 Domain Routers
props.content:
**Storage** · CanonicalStorageAdapter
**Memory** · IMemoryBackend
**Browser** · agent-browser / dev-browser
**AgentFS** · overlay CoW sandbox
**Reactive** · pipeline + middleware
**DNA** · ValidatorChain (8 built-in)
**Eval** · EvalStrategy contract

graph LR
  P[produce] --> J[judge]
  J --> C[compare]
  C --> K{keep or discard}
  K -->|keep| EK[exit_keep]
  K -->|discard| ED[exit_discard]
  K -->|HOLD| P
props.caption: DNA Eval Flow — produce → judge → compare → keep/discard

props.label: CONVERGENCE
props.title: AXI — Agent eXperience Interface
props.subtitle: 10 design principles for agent-ergonomic CLIs, validated by 490 benchmark runs

props.label: LANDSCAPE
props.title: Browser Automation + AgentFS
props.subtitle: Three browser strategies and a filesystem sandbox that makes constraint-checking inescapable

props.title: 🧪 dev-browser
props.content: Self-documenting CLI — `--help` IS the LLM guide. CLI → daemon (persistent page state) → QuickJS WASM sandbox → Playwright. Sandboxed scripts can't touch host filesystem.

props.title: 🤖 agent-browser
props.content: 80+ commands. Rust CLI → Node.js daemon → Playwright. Ref-based workflow (snapshot → refs → interact). ~200-400 tokens per interaction.

props.title: 🏆 chrome-devtools-axi
props.content: AXI-principled wrapper around CDP. Combined operations (`fill @uid text --submit` fills, submits, waits, returns snapshot). **Lowest cost, highest success rate.**

props.title: 📁 AgentFS Sandbox
props.content: Single SQLite file = VFS + KV store + tool call audit trail. Overlay CoW: fork state → run constraints → commit or discard. Agents **can't bypass** filesystem-level isolation.

props.label: ADAPTERS
props.title: The Adapter Landscape
props.subtitle: Pluggable backends for storage, memory, reactive hooks, and DNA validation

props.label: LIVE DNA CONTRACT
props.title: ATC Template Grounding Loop
props.subtitle: A real constraint regime governing 50 canonical ATC intents across templates, graph nodes, and runtime parsers

props.content: Per-intent alignment pass across graph, templates, and runtime parser. For each of 50 canonical intents, verify template text accuracy, slot correctness, FAA source proof, expected pilot readback, graph node alignment, and intent classification.

props.label: DOWNSTREAM
props.title: Six Systems Depend on Grounded Templates
props.subtitle: Every consumer requires accurate, source-proven template data

props.title: 🧠 DeBERTa Classifier
props.content: Intent classification training — text + intent + slots

props.title: ✂️ Compound Splitter
props.content: DeBERTa segment boundaries for compound instructions

props.title: 📡 Readback Registry
props.content: expected_readback → pilot readback generation

props.title: 🧪 Eval Harness
props.content: Scenario turns validate against grounded templates

props.title: 🎤 Whisper Fine-Tuning
props.content: Spoken text generated from template phraseology

props.title: 🗺️ FAA Graph Integrity
props.content: Templates must trace to verified graph nodes

props.label: TICK ANATOMY
props.title: One Tick = One Intent Bucket
props.subtitle: Six steps per tick, strictly scoped — no drift allowed

props.title: Step 1 · Inventory
props.content: Count template rows for this intent. Count graph nodes. Check runtime regex coverage. Output: inventory section in the tick log.

props.title: Step 2 · Verify Templates
props.content: For each row: Is the intent label correct? Is the text real FAA phraseology? Are slots correct and complete? Does `_source` have section + page + docling_ref? Flag invented templates for removal.

props.title: Step 3 · Add Readbacks
props.content: Add `expected_readback` field using readback format overlay, AIM 4-4-7 requirements, and partner extractor patterns. Readback slots must match template slots.

props.title: Step 4 · Verify Graph Alignment
props.content: Do graph nodes exist? Do params match template slots? Does section_ref match `_source.section`? Flag all misalignments.

props.title: Step 5 · Extract Runtime Rules
props.content: Check intent_policy_overlay for regex coverage. Mine partner extractors for patterns. Log recommendations — **DO NOT modify the overlay**.

props.title: Step 6 · Write Changes
props.content: Update `base.json` for this intent ONLY. Allowed: fix `_source`, add readbacks, fix slots, fix labels, add `needs_review`. Forbidden: add/remove rows, edit graph files, edit modules.

props.label: PARTNER EXTRACTORS
props.title: Runtime Regex Gold Mine
props.subtitle: 14 extractor families covering squawk, frequency, altitude, heading, runway, taxi, holding, clearance, emergency, traffic, weather, comms, surveillance, and special ops

rows.value: Special codes, standard codes, VFR, IDENT
Taxi via route, hold short patterns

props.label: COMPETITIVE INTELLIGENCE
props.title: Parity Registry Targets
props.subtitle: Structured tracking of product parity against external frameworks

props.label: DECISIONS LOG
props.title: Grounding Loop Decisions
props.subtitle: Append-only record — decisions that shaped the constraint surface

items.title: D1 — Ghost Intent Removed
items.description: altitude_assignment had zero graph nodes, zero templates, zero regex. Removed from enum: 51 → 50.

items.title: D2 — Enum is Hand-Maintained
items.description: Graph extraction misses 3 intents. Pretending enum is derived is dishonest. enums.py is now the ground truth.

items.title: D3 — Supplemental Graph Nodes
items.description: 3 overlay nodes added for cleared_option, disregard, hold_for_release. Docling-confirmed FAA sources: 4-3-4, 2-1-5, AIM 4-3-23.

items.title: D4 — Partner Extractors Are Gold, Not Code
items.description: 20+ extractors with rich patterns. Rules extracted into intent_policy_overlay.yaml — Python modules NOT imported.

items.title: D5 — DeBERTa Retraining Is Trivial
items.description: Fix templates first, retrain follows. Model learns text-to-label mappings; new labels plus same text equals same quality.

props.label: THE PITCH
props.title: Constraint Engineering as Competitive Moat
props.subtitle: The eval harness never stops growing — every exploit hardens the system

props.title: Define
props.content: Define what 'winning' means per constraint — deterministic gates + subjective checks

props.title: Build
props.content: Build the eval harness — self-referential, constrained by its own DNA

props.title: Adversary
props.content: Run adversarial flowminds — 'did you game the system?'

props.title: Harden
props.content: Agent cheats, you find out, new adversarial flowmind, constraint surface grows

props.title: Crowdsource
props.content: Anonymous telemetry feeds crowdsourced adversarial checks as a community plugin

props.label: OPEN QUESTIONS
props.title: Unresolved Design Decisions
props.subtitle: Six questions that will shape the next phase of constraint engineering

props.title: Core module or core plugin?
props.content: Central enough for core/, but plugin architecture gives extension flexibility. Likely: plugins/core-constraint-engine/ with tight core contracts.

props.title: TOON adoption scope?
props.content: Start with /now output, expand to all Lev CLI surfaces? 40% token savings validated.

props.title: Parity registry entity type?
props.content: New entity in dna/entities.yaml? Or child of metrics?

props.title: AgentFS WASM unblock?
props.content: Required for browser substrate convergence. Currently Linux-only cfg gate.

props.title: Crowdsourced adversarial flowminds
props.content: Governance model for community contributions? Quality gates for submitted constraints?

props.title: Beads management
props.content: 10 lifehacks skillbook for bd? Separate initiative or integrated with constraint engine?
